title: REPLI-g Advanced DNA Single Cell Kit (WGA)
author: Alejandro De Santiago
materials: Thaw all the reagents: DTT (purple cap) Buffer DLB (clear cap) Stop solution (red cap) H 2 0 sc (clear cap) REPLI-g advanced sc Reaction Buffer (yellow cap) REPLI-g sc DNA Polymerase (blue cap) The REPLI-g sc DNA Polymerase (blue cap) must thaw on ice!
When opening a new REPLI-g Advanced DNA Single Cell Kit Qiagen Catalog #150365 , prepare Buffer DLB (clear cap) by adding 250 µL H 2 O . Vortex to mix and centrifuge.

Pick individual nematodes into tubes containing 4 µL REPLI-g Advanced Storage Buffer ( REPLI-g Single Cell Cryo-Protect Reagent Qiagen Catalog #150370 ). Pick one worm per tube for genome skimming of single specimens. Live specimens work best, followed by samples previously flash frozen. If using frozen samples, thaw samples and transfer worms into tubes containing Repli G Advanced Storage Buffer as quickly as possible. Specimens left at room temperature for too long will degrade quickly and not result in good sequence data.

steps.title: Prepare Buffer D2 (for 12 reactions)
steps.instruction: Prepare Buffer D2 (for 12 reactions) : 3 µL of 1 Molarity (M) DTT (purple cap) 33 µL of reconstituted buffer DLB (clear cap)

steps.title: Prepare the Amplification Master Mix
steps.instruction: Prepare the Amplification Master Mix : Add reagents in this order! Vortex and centrifuge before adding the DNA polymerase 9 µL * n of H 2 O sc 29 µL * n of REPLI-g advanced sc Reaction Buffer (yellow cap) 2 µL * n of REPLI-g sc DNA Polymerase (blue cap)

steps.title: Incubate at 65 °C for 00:10:00...
steps.instruction: Incubate at 65 °C for 00:10:00 65 °C works well for bacterial cell. For eukaryotic cells, incubate at room temperature.

steps.title: Add 3 µL of Buffer D2...
steps.instruction: Add 3 µL of Buffer D2 to the PCR tube with nematode suspended in Repli G Advanced Storage Buffer.

steps.title: Mix tube by vortexing and centrifuge briefly
steps.instruction: Mix tube by vortexing and centrifuge briefly.

steps.title: Add 3 µL of the Stop Solution (red cap)
steps.instruction: Add 3 µL of the Stop Solution (red cap). Mix by slowly pipetting up and down.

steps.title: Add 40 µL of the Amplification...
steps.instruction: Add 40 µL of the Amplification Master Mix to the tube containing the lysed worm. Mix by slowly pipetting up and down.

steps.title: Incubate at 30 °C for 02:00:00...
steps.instruction: Incubate at 30 °C for 02:00:00 (if a heated lid is used, the temperature of the lid should be 70 °C )

steps.title: Inactivate the reactions by heating the...
steps.instruction: Inactivate the reactions by heating the samples for 00:03:00 at 65 °C

steps.title: Store DNA at -20 °C for...
steps.instruction: Store DNA at -20 °C for long storage (a concentration of at least 100 ng/μL is recommended)
